calendar.matters:
Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Western Macarthur By Plaintiff Henry Topolinski (Asbestos)
Off Calendar Mar-25-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: STEPHEN FISHBACK, Esq. of Brayton-Purcell, 415/898-1555 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff HENRY TOPOLINSKI and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $276,600.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made. The Court took matter Under Submission as of Mar-22-2002 by ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: M. TORREANO, #8600 (503)
